title: phacelia humilis var. congdonii
intro: Phacelia humilis var. congdonii, also known as Congdon's phacelia, is a variety of the annual phacelia plant native to California. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, as its leaves and flowers contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phacelia humilis var. congdonii include alleviating coughs, colds, and bronchitis symptoms, as well as supporting the immune system and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Phacelia humilis var. congdonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
